       末世天灾开局，长生游戏降临，人人可凭意念登陆游戏世界。
　　游戏实力跟现实同步，其内道具，功法，装备，甚至人物，都能具现化到现实世界。
　　顶级功法，逆天宝物，天材地宝，万界美女，名将名臣，统统收入囊中。
　　天灾结束，天地灵气复苏，规则改写，植物疯长，生物疯狂进化，妖族重现人间。
　　末世无情，血腥遍地，哀嚎遍野，想要生存，唯有变强。
　　提前预知未来的叶晨，身负三大异能，截机缘，夺造化，抢资源，建势力，立王朝，剑指长生。
　　……
　　叶晨：“无情也好，冷血也罢，卑鄙也行，众生皆在争渡，我又为何不可！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ed448bbc623797282e0535a166dec208","author":"泥太白","author_id":"","book_id":"7369462651207814206","book_name":"末世：飞升后，我，杀遍诸天","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182038","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7369462825867035198","read_count":"28689","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2336035"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"1034","tags":"科幻末世,空间,末世,求生,无敌,末日求生,天灾,争霸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4301b94d401f083fdf322bdf7423f712~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779393744&x-signature=TCCpN%2FyIgXSq35TZBIErobE8Ufo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1271471830729678","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_i        末世天灾开局，长生游戏降临，人人可凭意念登陆游戏世界。
　　游戏实力跟现实同步，其内道具，功法，装备，甚至人物，都能具现化到现实世界。
　　顶级功法，逆天宝物，天材地宝，万界美女，名将名臣，统统收入囊中。
　　天灾结束，天地灵气复苏，规则改写，植物疯长，生物疯狂进化，妖族重现人间。
　　末世无情，血腥遍地，哀嚎遍野，想要生存，唯有变强。
　　提前预知未来的叶晨，身负三大异能，截机缘，夺造化，抢资源，建势力，立王朝，剑指长生。
　　……

废卢风的末世数据文，主角开局接触天外陨石觉醒预知未来异能，靠着看破他人的未来机缘的能力，开局截胡机缘，开始滚雪球

四十多章开始末世游戏，凭借现实的超强异能，开局击杀世界BOSS，拥有游戏中的完美开局

无脑爽文，都市剧情bug很多，需要扔下脑子才能继续下去，游戏开始后好了一些，就是战力数值爆炸，战斗力体现不出数值的具体实力，有些小毒

对敌人什么的倒是很果断，少带点脑子，一目三五行，还算是一本爽文"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1733632173,"group_id":"7369462651207814206","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"吾心吾行澄如明镜，所作所为皆为正义","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N15KEX8g41UKaJo0Up/AfjI=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6635cb0680764bde87da89974bcbd95c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795984&x-signature=%2B0Cqf5u9t65E5Xyj2ziG2KhMjes%3D","user_id":"404222488359488","user_name":"元辰真罡"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"404222488359488","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1744678560,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7369462651207814206","book_info":{"abstract":"（末世+游戏+三国+争霸+爽文+空间+打怪升级+修仙+无敌+横推）
